# Wiki Guide

This repository uses GitHub Wiki for extended documentation.

## Suggested Wiki Structure

- `Home`
- `Installation`
- `Configuration`
- `Commands-and-Permissions`
- `Compatibility` (Paper/Spigot, Geyser/Floodgate, GriefPrevention)
- `Troubleshooting`
- `FAQ`

## Label Reference

Issue templates are aligned to these labels:

- `feature request`
- `bug`
- `documentation`
- `duplicate`
- `good first issue`
- `question`

## Notes

- Wiki content is managed in the GitHub Wiki UI (or the separate `.wiki.git` repository), not from this repository tree.
- Keep README concise and link to Wiki pages for deeper guides.
